{info:title=Источник}
Сгенерировано из: {{docs/habr-unique-projects/deep-pairs/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

h1. deep-pairs

_Файлов:_ 8

h2. Содержание

* [1-llm-gateway.md|1-llm-gateway.md] — 
* [2-document-rag.md|2-document-rag.md] — 
* [3-adversarial-multi-ide.md|3-adversarial-multi-ide.md] — 
* [4-skill-catalogs-subagents.md|4-skill-catalogs-subagents.md] — 
* [5-voice-local-memory.md|5-voice-local-memory.md] — 
* [6-tmux-village-openclaw.md|6-tmux-village-openclaw.md] — 
* [7-autoresearch-distributed.md|7-autoresearch-distributed.md] — 
* [8-self-aware-mcp-specs.md|8-self-aware-mcp-specs.md] — 



----

_Похожие документы:_
* [README|docs/svyazi-2-0/components/README.md] (сходство 0.17)
* [README|docs/habr-unique-projects/software-pairs/README.md] (сходство 0.15)
* [README|docs/svyazi-2-0/ensembles/README.md] (сходство 0.14)
